first_paragraph: ***Rita the American Girl*** ([Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language"): *Rita, la figlia americana*) is a 1965 [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") "[musicarello](/wiki/Musicarello "Musicarello")" film directed by [Piero Vivarelli](/wiki/Piero_Vivarelli "Piero Vivarelli") with [Totò](/wiki/Tot%C3%B2 "Totò") and [Rita Pavone](/wiki/Rita_Pavone "Rita Pavone").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

***Rita the American Girl*** ([Italian](/wiki/Italian_language "Italian language"): *Rita, la figlia americana*) is a 1965 [Italian](/wiki/Italy "Italy") "[musicarello](/wiki/Musicarello "Musicarello")" film directed by [Piero Vivarelli](/wiki/Piero_Vivarelli "Piero Vivarelli") with [Totò](/wiki/Tot%C3%B2 "Totò") and [Rita Pavone](/wiki/Rita_Pavone "Rita Pavone").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

## Plot

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rita_the_American_Girl&action=edit&section=1 "Edit section: Plot")]

Professor Serafino Benvenuti ([Totò](/wiki/Tot%C3%B2 "Totò")) is a classical director of limited talents. He is dismayed at the growing popularity of [beat music](/wiki/Beat_music "Beat music"), which he hears daily from a youth club across the street (whose houseband is [The Rokes](/wiki/The_Rokes "The Rokes")). Hoping to pass on the classical tradition to the next generation, Benvenuti decides to adopt an orphaned child from Chile, who unexpectedly turns out to be the 18-year-old Rita d’Angelo ([Rita Pavone](/wiki/Rita_Pavone "Rita Pavone")). Rita, however, is more in-tune with the contemporary pop sounds of the day than the classical tradition of her adoptive father, leading to conflict.

## Cast

[[edit](/w/index.php?title=Rita_the_American_Girl&action=edit&section=2 "Edit section: Cast")]

* [Totò](/wiki/Tot%C3%B2 "Totò") as Serafino Benvenuti
* [Rita Pavone](/wiki/Rita_Pavone "Rita Pavone") as Rita D'Angelo
* [Fabrizio Capucci](/wiki/Fabrizio_Capucci "Fabrizio Capucci") as Fabrizio Carli
* [Lina Volonghi](/wiki/Lina_Volonghi "Lina Volonghi") as Greta Wagner
* [Umberto D'Orsi](/wiki/Umberto_D%27Orsi "Umberto D'Orsi") as Orazio
* [Veronica](/w/index.php?title=Veronica_(actress)&action=edit&redlink=1 "Veronica (actress) (page does not exist)") as Diana
* [Shel Shapiro](/wiki/Shel_Shapiro "Shel Shapiro") (credited as David Norman Shapiro)
* [Mike Shepstone](/wiki/Mike_Shepstone "Mike Shepstone")
* [Bobby Posner](/w/index.php?title=Bobby_Posner&action=edit&redlink=1 "Bobby Posner (page does not exist)")
* [Johnny Charlton](/w/index.php?title=Johnny_Charlton&action=edit&redlink=1 "Johnny Charlton (page does not exist)")
